summary: The call mostly proceeds smoothly, but there is a moderate workflow bug where the agent does not clarify the next steps or expected timeframe after stating they cannot find the medication details. This could leave the patient uncertain about when or how their request will be fulfilled.

bugs.title: Unclear next steps after refill request submission
bugs.description: After stating that the medication details could not be found and that the request would be 'documented,' the agent fails to specify what happens next, such as how long the review will take, whether the patient should expect a call, or if they need to follow up.
bugs.why_it_matters: Patients need clear expectations for medication refills to avoid missed doses or confusion. Not informing the patient about how or when they will be contacted can lead to anxiety or medication nonadherence.
bugs.transcript_evidence: User: Looks like I'm unable to find your medication details in our system. I'll document your refill request and let our clinic support team know. They'll get back to you as soon as they can.
bugs.suggested_fix: The agent should specify the expected timeframe for follow-up, who will contact the patient, and what to do if they do not hear back in a reasonable period.

strengths: Agent calmly gathered all relevant refill information
The agent confirmed pharmacy details and asked follow-up questions
Polite closing and clear communication overall
